data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — SKILL.md has SC1 (ci.fast_gate_job etc. at line 1125-1128), SC2 (numbered selection dialogue at line 1143), SC3 (merge.ci_workflow_name deprecation at line 1047-1064), SC4 (version.file_path numbered dialogue at line 1183-1191), SC5 (no jira.project_key, no design.system without _name found — negative assertions pass already)
